entries.source: Use formulas, tables, and target score plans.
entries.value: Koristi formule, tablice in načrtte za ciljani rezultat.

entries.source: Use forum-ready posts, reply drafts, and discussion summaries.
entries.value: Koristite forum-spremne postte, odgovori nacrte, in diskusiju sažetke.

entries.source: Use Geography Explorer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Ethics Dilemmas. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use Geography Explorer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Geography Explorer, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use goal cards, priority, time estimate, blocker, and done criteria.
entries.value: Koristite gol kartice, prioritet, procjenu vremena, blokator, in učinio kriterije.

entries.source: Use group agenda, roles, rounds, resources, and follow-up tasks.
entries.value: Koristiti grupni program, uloge, krugte, resurse in daljnje zadače.

entries.source: Use group roles, timer rounds, check-ins, and debrief prompts.
entries.value: Koristite grupne uloge, tajmer runde, check-ins, in ispitivanje prompts.

entries.source: Use habit recipe, obstacle plan, and 7-day experiment.
entries.value: Koristite recepte za naviku, načrt prepreke, in 7-dnevni eksperiment.

entries.source: Use hint-first and explain-back workflows for homework support.
entries.value: Koristite namig-prvo in objašnjenje-natrag radne procese za domaču podporo.

entries.source: Use hints before answers
entries.value: Uporabiti namige pred odgovori

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Koristi savjete preden odgovora.

entries.source: Use hints, checkpoints, and small examples rather than full final answers.
entries.value: Koristite savjete, kontrolne punktte in male primere, a ne pune konačne odgovore.

entries.source: Use hints, step checks, and writing feedback without turning the learning into answer copying.
entries.value: Uporabi namige, preverjanja korakov in povratne informacije pri pisanju, ne da bi učenje postalo prepisovanje odgovorov.

entries.source: Use historical AI roleplay with three rules:
entries.value: Koristi povijesnu UI roleplay z tri pravila:

entries.source: Use historical modes with labels for documented facts versus simulation.
entries.value: Koristite povijesne načine z oznakama za dokumentirane činjenice v odnosu na simulaciju.

entries.source: Use Historical Person mode while treating generated dialogue as simulation.
entries.value: Koristi povijesni način osobe pri tretiranju generiranog dijaloga kao simulacije.

entries.source: Use History Cause-and-Effect when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Economics Simulator. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to ask for a hint, then ask the learner to explain the next move.
entries.value: Koristite domači trener pitati za savjet, a zatim pitati učenca razložiti sljedeči potez.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to move one step at a time instead of asking for the final answer.
entries.value: Koristite Domači trener za kretanje korak za korakom umjesto pitati za končni odgovor.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach to narrow the stuck point, then explain the next line in your own words.
entries.value: Koristite domači trener suziti zapečačenu točku, a zatim razložiti sljedeču liniju v svojim riječima.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Explain My Answer. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Homework Coach, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Explain My Answer. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use https://inspirlearning.com for the site, /mission for the mission, /topics for the public learning mode directory, and /chat/learn-anything for the default guest learning experience.
entries.value: Koristite https://inspirlearning.com za stran, /mission za misiju, /topics za imenik javnog učenja in /chat/learn-anything za uobičajeno iskustvo v učenju gostiju.

entries.source: Use hypothesis, materials, method, observation, and explanation sections when useful.
entries.value: Koristite hipotezu, materijale, metodu, promatranje, in objašnjavanje dijelte ko je korisno.

entries.source: Use idea menus, selection criteria, and next-step sketches.
entries.value: Koristite jelovnike ideja, kriterije odabira, in skice sljedečeg koraka.

entries.source: Use immersion for engagement while keeping learning goals, evidence, and reflection visible.
entries.value: Koristite potapanje za angažman, a održavanje ciljeva učenja, dokaza in odraz vidljiv.

entries.source: Use in-character dialogue and short coaching notes.
entries.value: Koristite dijalog v karakteristici in kratke trenerske note.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.
entries.value: Koristite inspir kao brezplačen UI tutor za učence: domači savjeti, Sokratska vprašanja, matematički koraci provjera, pisanje povratne informacije, kvizi, kartice za ponavljanje, in ispit prep.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.
entries.value: Koristite inspir prvi ko je vaša pretraga je o akciji: razložite to preprosto, postavite mi Sokratska vprašanja, dajte mi zadaču savjet, preverite moj matematički korak, kviz me, ustvarite kartice za ponavljanje, raspravljati o ovoj temi, ali mi pomoči načrtirati reviziju.

entries.source: Use inspir for essay feedback, reading support, speaking practice, source critique, and revision loops that improve structure without replacing the learner's voice.
entries.value: Koristite inspir za povratne informacije eseja, podporo čitanju, praksu govora, izvornu kritiku in revidirajuče petlje ki poboljšavaju strukturu bez zamjene glasa učenca.

entries.source: Use inspir for homework hints, math step checks, writing feedback, source critique, Socratic questions, and flashcards without exposing private chats.
entries.value: Koristite inspir za savjete za domaču zadaču, matematičke provjere, povratnu informaciju, izvornu kritiku, Sorokratska vprašanja, in flash kartice bez izlaganja privatnih čavrljanja.

entries.source: Use inspir for step-by-step math help, homework hints, Socratic reasoning, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep without answer-copying.
entries.value: Koristite inspir za pomoč matematike korak-po-korak, zadače savjete, Sokratski obrazloženje, kvizi, flash kartice, in ispit prep bez prepisivanja odgovora.

entries.source: Use inspir to learn anything independently with explanations, code tutoring, project coaching, research help, concept maps, study plans, and habit support.
entries.value: Koristite inspir kako biste naučili bilo kar neovisno z objašnjenjima, podučavanjem koda, projektnim trenerstvom, raziščivačkom pomoči, konceptnim kartama, načrtovima študija in navikom podrške.

entries.source: Use inspir to turn confusion into questions, examples, retrieval practice, writing feedback, debate, and a personal study plan.
entries.value: Koristite inspir za pretvaranje zbunjenosti v vprašanja, primere, praksu dovodženja, povratnu informaciju, raspravu in osebni načrt študija.

entries.source: Use inspir when the stuck point is specific.
entries.value: Koristite inspir ko je zaglavljena točka specifična.

entries.source: Use inspir when you want a free public AI learning mode that can explain, question, quiz, coach homework, build flashcards, and adapt to the exact thing you are stuck on.
entries.value: Koristite inspir ko želite brezplačen javni UI način učenja ki lahko razložiti, pitati, kviz, zadaču trenera, graditi flash kartice, in prilagoditi na točnu stvar ste zaglavili na.

entries.source: Use Interactive Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Collaborative Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Interactive Instruction, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Collaborative Instruction. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.value: Uporabi Interactive Instruction, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use it for comparison
entries.value: Koristi ga za usporedbu

entries.source: Use it for debugging as a learning exercise: share the symptom, your expectation, and what you already tried, then ask for the next diagnostic step.
entries.value: Koristite ga za debugiranje kao vaju učenja: podijelite simptom, očekivanje, in ono kar ste več pokušali, a zatim zatražite sljedeči dijagnostički korak.

entries.source: Use key takeaways, outline, definitions, and review questions.
entries.value: Koristite ključne obroke, obris, definicije, in pregledati vprašanja.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything for broad explanations, Socratic Instruction for reasoning, Homework Coach for hint-first help, Math Step Coach for equations, and Flashcard Builder or Quiz me on Trivia for recall practice.
entries.value: Koristite Nauči bilo kar za široka objašnjenja, Sokratski instrukcije za razmišljanje, Početni rad Trener za namig-prvu pomoč, Mathematical Step Trener za jednadžbe, in Flashcard Builder ali Quiz me na Trivia za opoziv prakse.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to clarify the concept and find examples.
entries.value: Koristite Naučite Bilo kar da razjasnite koncept in pronači primere.

entries.source: Use Learn Anything to convert the reasoning into a concise explanation.
entries.value: Koristite Naučite Bilo kar da pretvorite razmišljanje v koncizno objašnjenje.

entries.value: Koristite narativ da bi koncepti nezaboravni.

entries.source: Use nested bullets, tables, or Mermaid text when helpful.
entries.value: Koristite ugniježdžene metke, stolte, ali sirena tekst kad je korisno.

entries.source: Use numbered locations, images, and recall checkpoints.
entries.value: Koristiti numerirane lokacije, slike, in opoziv kontrolne punktte.

entries.source: Use objectives, summaries, examples, traps, questions, and next review.
entries.value: Koristite ciljeve, sažetke, primere, zamke, vprašanja in sljedeči pregled.

entries.source: Use observation, interpretation, evidence, and next-question sections.
entries.value: Koristite promatranje, tumačenje, dokaze, in slijedeča vprašanja.

entries.source: Use of Data
entries.value: Korištenje podatkov

entries.source: Use pair banks, scrambled lists, answer key, and review notes.
entries.value: Koristite banke parova, kodirane liste, odgovorite na ključ in pregledajte bilješke.

entries.value: Koristite Project Coach pretvoriti nejasnu ideju v sljedeči testable značajku ali učenje kontrolni punkt.

entries.source: Use prompt
entries.value: Koristi prompt

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Koristite prompt ki uspore UI:

entries.source: Use prompts to learn actively, not passively.
entries.value: Koristite poticaje za aktivno učenje, a ne pasivno.

entries.source: Use public guest modes for free, then explore the open-source work and school deployment paths.
entries.value: Brezplačno uporabi javne gostujoče načine, nato razišči odprtokodno delo in poti uvedbe v šolah.

entries.source: Use public mode descriptions to choose the behavior before a session starts.
entries.value: Koristi opise javnog režima za odabir ponašanja preden početka seje.

entries.source: Use quests, levels, badges, and boss questions.
entries.value: Koristite potrage, razine, značke, in šef vprašanja.

entries.source: Use quiz and flashcard modes for active recall, then route missed items into review.
entries.value: Koristite kviz in kartica za ponavljanje načine za aktivni opoziv, a zatim preusmjerite propuštene stavke v pregled.

entries.source: Use Quiz and Flashcards after the explanation so the same error becomes easier to spot.
entries.value: Koristite Quiz in Flashcards nakon objašnjenja tako da ista greška postaje lakše uočiti.

entries.source: Use Quiz Me On Trivia to reveal what you actually remember.
entries.value: Koristi Quiz Me On Trivia da otkriješ čega se zapravo sječaš.

entries.source: Use Quiz me on Trivia when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Interactive Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.source: Use Quiz mode to test recall first, then repair only the topics that need attention.
entries.value: Koristite Quiz način da prvo testirate opoziv, a zatim popravite samo teme ki trebaju pažnju.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to make missed questions visible and repeatable.
entries.value: Koristite kvizte in flash kartice kako bi propuštena vprašanja vidljiva in ponavljaju.

entries.source: Use quizzes and flashcards to practise formulas, definitions, and problem types.
entries.value: Koristite kvizte in kartice za ponavljanje za prakticiranje formule, definicije, in probleme vrste.

entries.source: Use quizzes, flashcards, and Socratic questions so the learner shows what they understand.
entries.value: Koristite kvizte, bljeskalice in sokratska vprašanja kako bi učenec pokazao kar razumiju.

entries.source: Use rain for reading
entries.value: Uporabi dež za branje

entries.source: Use rain sounds for revision
entries.value: Uporabi zvoke dežja za ponavljanje

entries.source: Use Reading Companion to summarize, question, and explain the passage before citing it.
entries.value: Koristite čitanje Družina za povzetek, vprašanje, in razložiti pasus preden nego kar ga citirati.

entries.value: Koristite reflektorske poticaje, jačine učenca, in jedan sljedeči eksperiment.

entries.source: Use report sections: wins, evidence, blockers, lessons, next week.
entries.value: Koristite dijelte izvještaja: pobjede, dokazi, blokatori, lekcije, sljedeči tjedan.

entries.value: Koristite raziščivačka vprašanja, izvorni matrice, in sintetičke bilješke.

entries.source: Use review queues, due dates, and confidence ratings.
entries.value: Koristite recenziju redova, dužni datumi, in ocjene povjerenja.

entries.source: Use scorecards for clarity, structure, evidence, and delivery notes.
entries.value: Koristite preglednice za jasnoču, strukturu, dokaze in isporuku note.

entries.source: Use Service in any manner that could disable, overburden, damage, or impair Service or interfere with any other party’s use of Service, including their ability to engage in real time activities through Service. Use any robot, spider, or other automatic device, process, or means to access Service for any purpose, including monitoring or copying any of the material on Service. Use any manual process to monitor or copy any of the material on Service or for any other unauthorized purpose without our prior written consent. Use any device, software, or routine that interferes with the proper working of Service. Introduce any viruses, trojan horses, worms, logic bombs, or other material which is malicious or technologically harmful. Attempt to gain unauthorized access to, interfere with, damage, or disrupt any parts of Service, the server on which Service is stored, or any server, computer, or database connected to Service. Attack Service via a denial-of-service attack or a distributed denial-of-service attack. Take any action that may damage or falsify Company rating. Otherwise attempt to interfere with the proper working of Service.
entries.value: Koristite uslugu na bilo ki način ki bi mogao onesposobiti, prekoračiti, oštetiti, ali oštetiti uslugu ali ometati bilo koju drugu stranku uporaba storitve, uključujuči njihto sposobnost da se bave v realnom vremenu aktivnosti putem servisa. Koristite bilo ki robot, pauk, ali drugi automatski uredžaj, proces, ali sredstva za dostop servisu za bilo koju namen, uključujuči pračenje ali kopiranje bilo kig materijala na servisu. Koristite bilo ki ručni postupak za pračenje ali kopiranje bilo kig materijala na servisu ali za bilo koju drugu neovlaštenu namen bez našeg prethodnog pismenog pristanka. Koristite bilo ki uredžaj, softver, ali rutinu ki ometa pravilno djelovanje servisa. Uvedite bilo ki viruse, trojanske konje, crve, logičke bombe ali druge materijale ki su zlonamjerno ali tehnološki štetni. Pokušajte steči neovlašteni dostop, ometanje, oštečenje, ali ometanje bilo kig dijela storitve, poslužitelj na kim je servis pohranjen, ali bilo ki poslužitelj, računalo, ali baza podatkov ptezanih z Službom. Storitev napada putem poricanja ali distribuiranog napada poricanja storitve. Poduzmite bilo koju akciju ki lahko oštetiti ali krivotvoriti ocjenu tvrtke. V suprotnom pokušajte ometati pravilno djelovanje storitve.

entries.source: Use short focus plans, checklists, and post-session reflection prompts.
entries.value: Koristite kratke načrtte fokusa, kontrolne liste, in nakon seje refleksije poticaji.

entries.source: Use short sections, examples, analogies, and GFM-friendly lists or tables when they help.
entries.value: Koristite kratke dijelte, primere, analogije, in GFM- friendly lists ali tablice ko pomažu.

entries.source: Use short summaries, quote-light references, and question sets.
entries.value: Koristite kratke sažetke, navodne reference in sette vprašanja.

entries.source: Use short supportive notes and practical next actions.
entries.value: Koristite kratke potporne note in praktične sljedeče akcije.

entries.source: Use simple ambient sound presets to reduce distraction during reading, writing, revision, or problem solving.
entries.value: Uporabi preproste prednastavitve ambientnega zvoka za manj motenj med branjem, pisanjem, ponavljanjem ali reševanjem problemov.

entries.source: Use simple notation, examples, and practice prompts.
entries.value: Koristiti jednostavan zapis, primere in praksu poticaji.

entries.source: Use simple tables, cause-effect chains, and caveat notes.
entries.value: Koristite jednostavne stolte, uzrok-efekt lanaca, in kaveat note.

entries.source: Use simple-language rewrites and gap checklists.
entries.value: Koristi prepiske preprostog jezika in popise praznina.

entries.source: Use sketching as a learning move: plan diagrams, label rough maps, explain processes, or turn a messy idea into a clearer visual.
entries.value: Uporabi skiciranje kot učno potezo: načrtuj diagrame, označi grobe zemljevide, pojasni procese ali neurejeno idejo spremeni v jasnejši prikaz.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction to ask what would change your mind.
entries.value: Koristi Sokratske upute in vprašaj kar bi ti promijenilo mišljenje.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction to expose assumptions and weak links.
entries.value: Koristi Sokratske upute za odkrivanje pretpostavki in slabih veza.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction to make sure you can justify the next move in your own words.
entries.value: Koristi Sokratske upute kako bi se osigurao da lahkoš opravdati sljedeči potez vlastitim riječima.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction to uncover missing assumptions and shallow confidence.
entries.value: Koristite Sokratske upute da otkrijete nestale pretpostavke in plitko povjerenje.

entries.source: Use Socratic questions
entries.value: Uporabi Sokratova vprašanja

entries.source: Use Socratic questions to extract what changed in your understanding.
entries.value: Koristite Sokratska vprašanja kako biste izvukli ono kar se promijenilo v vašem razumijevanju.

entries.source: Use sound recommendations and focus setup notes.
entries.value: Koristite zvučne preporuke in postavke fokusa note.

entries.value: Koristi izvornu kritiku za bilo koju tvrdnju koju lahkoš navesti.

entries.source: Use source critique for claims you might cite or act on.
entries.value: Koristite izvornu kritiku za trditve ki biste mogli navesti ali djelovati.

entries.source: Use source critique or speaking practice to test whether the argument holds.
entries.value: Koristite izvornu kritiku ali praksu govora kako biste preverili drži li se argument.

entries.value: Koristite tablice dionika in uravnoteženu pro/con analizo.

entries.value: Koristite STAR ali okvire za reagovanje na situaciju ko je to potrebno.

entries.source: Use story beats plus learning notes.
entries.value: Koristite priče pobjede plus učenje note.

entries.source: Use streak status, tiny action, recovery rule, and weekly reflection.
entries.value: Koristite status niza, sitne akcije, pravilo o oporavku in tjedno razmišljanje.

entries.source: Use structured lessons when the path is known.
entries.value: Koristi strukturirane lekcije ko je put poznat.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder and Habit Coach to build a routine that can restart after missed days.
entries.value: Koristite Studijski načrt Graditelj in Nabit Trener ustvariti rutinu ki lahko ponovno pokrenuti nakon propuštenih dana.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder or Habit Coach to make small sessions and restarts visible.
entries.value: Koristite Studij načrt Graditelj ali Nabit Trener napraviti male seje in ponovno pokreče vidljiv.

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder to choose a small goal, then use quizzes, flashcards, project steps, or concept maps to prove progress.
entries.value: Koristite Studij načrt Graditelj odabrati mali cilj, a zatim uporabljati kvizte, kartice za ponavljanje, korake projekta, ali koncept karte kako bi se dokazao napredak.

entries.source: Use tables with word, meaning, example, memory hook, and practice prompt.
entries.value: Koristite stolte z riječima, kar pomeni, primer, memorijske kuke, in vajati brzo.

entries.source: Use tables, plain-language takeaways, and caution notes.
entries.value: Koristite stolte, obične jezične obroke, in opomene zapažanja.

entries.source: Use target language first, then brief feedback in the learner's preferred support language.
entries.value: Koristite prvo ciljni jezik, a zatim kratku povratnu informaciju v učenectem poželjnom jeziku podrške.

entries.source: Use task boards, deadlines, and next-action lists.
entries.value: Koristite zadače, rokte in popise sljedečih akcija.

entries.source: Use task cards, elapsed time, notes, and follow-up block suggestions.
entries.value: Koristite zadače, proteklo vrijeme, bilješke in predendloge bloka.

entries.source: Use test sections, timing, answer keys, rubrics, and review plans.
entries.value: Koristite probne dijelte, tajming, odgovor na ključeve, rubrike, in pregled načrtova.

entries.source: Use the comparison below to pick the first public mode or guide.
entries.value: Koristite donju usporedbu za odabir prvog javnog načina ali vodnika.

entries.source: Use the exam date, syllabus, available time, and weak areas to create a plan that can survive real life.
entries.value: Uporabi datum izpita, učni načrt, razpoložljiv čas in šibka področja, da ustvariš načrt, ki zdrži resnično življenje.

entries.source: Use the Feynman technique to reveal gaps and simplify understanding.
entries.value: Koristite Feynman tehniku da otkrijete rupe in pojednostavite razumevanje.

entries.source: Use the historical person mode for perspective-taking, then verify claims with source critique.
entries.value: Koristite povijesni način osoba za uzimanje perspektive, a zatim preverite trditve z izvornom kritikom.

entries.source: Use the lesson library to learn the official sequence and practise core skills.
entries.value: Koristite lekciju knjižnicu za učenje službene sekvence in vajati osnovne spretnosti.

entries.source: Use the linked guide, prompt, subject hub, or learning path to review the weak spot later.
entries.value: Uporabi povezani vodnik, poziv, predmetno središče ali učno pot, da šibko točko pregledaš pozneje.

entries.source: Use the live mode and paste your goal, a paragraph from the article, or the part that still feels fuzzy. Ask for one small task before asking for a full explanation.
entries.value: Koristite način života in zalijepite svoj cilj, odlomak iz članka, ali dio ki se još uvijek osječa mutno. Vprašajte za jedan mali naloga preden nego kar zatražite potpuno objašnjenje.

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Koristi pravi način rada

entries.source: Use the right tool for the learning job.
entries.value: Koristite pravi alat za posao učenja.

entries.source: Use the school page to explore custom workflows, confidentiality needs, and rollout steps.
entries.value: Koristite školsku stran za raziščivanje prilagodženih radnih tokova, pterljivosti potrebe, in korake pokretanja.

entries.source: Use the secure reset link from your email, then choose a new password for your account.
entries.value: Koristite sigurnu pteznicu resetirajte iz e-pošte, a zatim odaberite nto lozinku za Vaš korisnički račun.

entries.source: Use the simulations to generate questions and context, then verify important claims with primary or trusted secondary sources.
entries.value: Koristite simulacije za generiranje vprašanja in konteksta, a zatim preverite važne trditve z primarnim ali pouzdanim sekundarnim izvorima.

entries.source: Use the topics directory to match the learning job to the right behavior.
entries.value: Koristite imenik tema za uskladživanje posao učenja z pravim ponašanjem.

entries.source: Use these facts when describing inspir in articles, partner pages, education directories, school notes, and AI-generated summaries.
entries.value: Koristite te činjenice pri opisu inspir v člancima, partnerskim stranicama, obrazovnim direktorijima, školskim bilješkama in UI generiranim povzetkima.

entries.source: Use these prompts in Socratic Instruction:
entries.value: Koristite te poticaje v sokratskim instrukcijama:

entries.source: Use this compact format: Brief read: one sentence. Map update: concise Claim, Assumption, Gap, or Correction bullets as relevant. Next question: exactly one question. For the first reply, use Target, Contract, and First question.
entries.value: Koristite ta kompaktni format: Kratko pročitano: jedna rečenica. Ažuriranje karte: koncizni zahtjevi, uzduživanje, Gap, ali ispravke metaka kao relevantne. Sljedeče vprašanje: natančno jedno vprašanje. Za prvi odgovor, uporabljate Cilj, Ugovor, in Prvo vprašanje.

entries.source: Use this for school, partner, CSR, and education access references.
entries.value: Koristite ovo za šole, partnera, CSR, in obrazovni dostop referencama.

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: Koristi to petlju:

entries.source: Use this mode inside a study workflow.
entries.value: Koristi ta način rada unutar rada študija.

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Koristite ovo pravilo: nakon bilo kig UI objašnjenja, zatvorite petlju z izlaza iz vlastitog uma. Napišite ideju natrag. Riješite svježu verziju. Napravite flash karticu. Naučite je do imaginarnog mladžeg učenca. Vprašajte za kviz. Kaj više seja traži od vas da proizvedete, to je manje verjetno da čete se zavarati.

entries.source: Use this when citing the long-form guide library, study prompts, and mode-specific articles.
entries.value: Koristite ovo pri navodenju dugoročne biblioteke vodnika, poticaja študija, in način-specifičnih članaka.

entries.source: Use this when describing the full set of guest-mode learning tools that are meant to be indexed.
entries.value: Koristite ovo pri opisivanju kompleta alata za učenje gost-način rada ki su namijenjeni indeksiranju.

entries.source: Use this when introducing inspir as the main product or linking from a directory, profile, or article.
entries.value: Koristite ovo pri uvodženju inspir kao glavni proizvod ali ptezivanju iz direktorija, profila ali članka.

entries.source: Use this when linking readers straight into the live learning experience.
entries.value: Koristite ovo pri ptezivanju čitalaca direktno v iskustvo učenja uživo.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, crawler policy, and school trust.
entries.value: Koristite ovo pri upučivanju na javne/privatne granice, politiku puzanja in školsko povjerenje.

entries.source: Use thought experiments, argument maps, and balanced summaries.
entries.value: Koristite misaone eksperimente, mape argumenta in uravnotežene sažetke.

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: Koristite tri ocjene:

entries.source: Use Time Travel or Historical Person mode, while keeping generated dialogue separate from documented sources.
entries.value: Koristite način putovanja kroz vrijeme ali povijesne osobe, uz održavanje generiranog dijaloga odvojenog od dokumentiranih izvora.

entries.source: Use Time Travel to understand the setting, constraints, beliefs, and pressures before judging the outcome.
entries.value: Koristite Putovanje kroz vrijeme da biste razumjeli položaj, ograničenja, vjerovanja in pritiske preden nego kar procijenite ishod.

entries.source: Use Time travel when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Quiz me on Trivia. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Uporabi Time travel, ko je to pravi način za nalogo. Če želiš sorodno pot, poskusi Quiz me on Trivia. Lahko tudi prebrskaš blog o učenju z UI za učne metode, sokratsko učenje, kartice, igranje vlog in aktivni priklic.

entries.source: Use Time travel when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Uporabi Time travel, ko želiš sejo, ki se začne hitro, a se ti še vedno prilagodi. Prvi cilj ni zveneti impresivno. Prvi cilj je, da se naslednji korak zdi izvedljiv.

entries.source: Use Time Travel with clear place, period, constraints, and learning goals.
entries.value: Koristite vrijeme Putovati z jasnim mjestom, razdoblje, ograničenja, in cilji učenja.

entries.source: Use Time Travel with time, place, role, constraints, and evidence labels.
entries.value: Koristite Putovanje kroz vrijeme z vremenom, mjesto, ulogu, ograničenja, in oznake dokaza.

entries.source: Use timelines, cause layers, and consequence maps.
entries.value: Koristite vremenske linije, uzrokujte slojeve, in posljedice mape.

entries.source: Use tree structures, node labels, links, and next-step prompts.
entries.value: Koristite strukture stabla, oznake čvorova, veze, in sljedeči korak prompts.

entries.source: Use unlabeled parts, hint tiers, answer key, and review prompts.
entries.value: Koristite neoznačene dijelte, stupnjeve savjeta, odgovor ključ, in pregled prompts.

entries.source: Use visual vocabulary and guided looking prompts.
entries.value: Koristite vizuelni rječnik in vodene pojačivače za gledanje.

entries.source: Use Viva Practice when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Learning Game Master. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.value: Koristite tjedno načrtte, rezervne načrtte, in sitne sljedeče akcije.

entries.source: Viva Practice AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.
entries.value: Viva Practice način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Practice viva, oral exams, project defenses, and rapid follow-up questions with calm feedback.

entries.source: We at inspir ensure our firm commitment to our users’ privacy and protecting their priceless information. This is intended to help users understand how we collect, use, disclose and protect the information Effective date: 2022-09-01
entries.value: Mi na inspir osiguravamo našu čvrstu predanost zasebnosti naših uporabnika in štitimo njihte neprocjenjive informacije. To je svrha pomoči uporabnikima da razumiju kako prikupljamo, koristimo, otkrivamo in štitimo informacije Datum djelotvornosti: 2022-09-01

entries.source: We collect several different types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our Service to you
entries.value: Prikupljamo nekoliko različitih vrsta informacija za različite namene kako bismo vam pružili in poboljšali našu uslugu

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: Poštujemo Ne Track signale in ne pratiti, biljke, ali uporabljati oglašavanje ko je postavljen mehanizam Ne Track preglednik. Nemojte Track je preferencija koju lahko postaviti v vašem web pregledniku kako biste obvestilali web-stranice da ne želite biti pračeni. Lahko omogučiti ali onemogučiti Ne pratiti posjetom Postavke ali Postavke stranice vašeg web preglednika. Ako ste mladži od 18 godina, boravite v Kaliforniji, in imate registrirani račun z servisom, imate pravo zatražiti uklanjanje neželjenih podatkov ki javno objavite na Storitevma. Da biste zatražili uklanjanje takvih podatkov, molimo vas da nas kontaktirate putem donjih kontaktnih informacija in uključite e-mail adresu ptezanu z vašim računom in izjavom koju boravite v Kaliforniji. Mi bomo se pobrinuti da podatki nisu javno prikazani na Storitevma, ali budite svjesni da podatki ne mogu biti potpuno ali sveobuhvatno uklonjeni iz svih naših sustava (npr. sigurnosne kopije, itd.).
